subject: [PATCH 07/11] mm/zsmalloc, zswap: Handle objcg charging and lifetime in zsmalloc

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the new charging mechanism and suggested additional checks to ensure accurate memory accounting. Also pointed out that some functions are missing EXPORT_SYMBOL tags.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series updates the zsmalloc and zswap modules to handle object charging and lifetime management correctly, aligning with obj_cgroup changes. It introduces a new charging mechanism based on size_class slots rather than compressed object sizes.
